description: Split hero block with dark image side, light features panel, CTA, contact strip, and stat counters.
goals: Keep strong split layout proportions on desktop
Keep features and stats as repeaters

fieldGuidance.title: 8-16 words, include one highlighted phrase.

fieldGuidance.stats[].value: Short numeric value with optional plus sign.
